description: Write unit tests for all gen-components under the src/components/gen-components directory to ensure they function correctly and handle edge cases.
steps: Identify all gen-components in the src/components/gen-components directory.
Create a test file for each gen-component and create them in the src/tests directory.
Write unit tests for each gen-component using a testing framework called vitetest, covering various scenarios and edge cases.
Run the tests to ensure they pass successfully and fix any issues that arise.
